**🚨 DO NOT REPORT SECURITY FLAWS PUBLICLY 🚨**

If you have discovered a security vulnerability, please do not create a public issue.
Instead, please contact the developer directly via Discord (Direct Message) or send an email to your-email@example.com.

Provide a brief description of the vulnerability and the steps to reproduce it in your private message.
